# Deriv Digit Trading Platform - Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
A complete responsive web application for trading Deriv Digit Contracts with real-time WebSocket API integration, digit analytics, martingale trading system, and futuristic trading dashboard.

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: React 18 + Vite
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: TailwindCSS with custom animations
- State Management: Zustand
- WebSocket: Deriv WebSocket API
- Build Tool: Vite

## Setup Progress

- [x] Verify project requirements
- [ ] Scaffold the React + Vite project
- [ ] Install dependencies
- [ ] Configure TailwindCSS
- [ ] Create component structure
- [ ] Implement Deriv API integration
- [ ] Build core features
- [ ] Add futuristic UI design
- [ ] Test and deploy

## Key Features to Implement
1. Welcome screen with Deriv API credentials
2. Market selection (1HZ25V, 1HZ50V, 1HZ75V, 1HZ100V)
3. Live tick stream
4. Last digit analytics (0-9 digits)
5. Digit circle dashboard
6. Top digit ranking panel
7. Martingale trading logic
8. Trade execution and history
9. Real-time dashboard

## Design Requirements
- Dark theme (Deep Space Black #050816)
- Glassmorphism + Neon effects
- Cyberpunk-inspired professional trading platform
- Responsive design (desktop and mobile)
- Smooth animations and transitions
